attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT (select FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT from $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,ACOD.INCIDENT_NUMBER AS SR_NUMBER,
        ACOD.WG_NAME,
       SUM (CAST (ACCRUED_ACOD AS DECIMAL (22, 10))) AS ACCRUED_ACOD,       
       SUM (CAST (ACOD AS DECIMAL (22, 10))) AS FIN_ACOD
  FROM (
SELECT         ACTS.INCIDENT_NUMBER,
               ACTS.CHG_WKGRP_NAME AS WG_NAME,
               SUM (CAST (ACTS.ACTS_WORKTIME AS DECIMAL (22, 10))) AS ACOD,
               CAST (0 AS DECIMAL (22, 10)) AS ACCRUED_ACOD
               FROM (
SELECT INC.INCIDENT_NUMBER,
                       INC.CLOSED_DATE,
                       INC.CURRENT_OWNER_WG_NAME,
                       WKG.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
                  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_F_V INC,
                       $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_TAC_WORKGROUP WKG
                 WHERE     1 = 1
                       AND INC.CLOSED_DATE IS NOT NULL
                                                                         AND (CAST ( (INC.CLOSED_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') >= ( SELECT cast( START_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         AND CAST ( (INC.CLOSED_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS')<= ( SELECT cast( END_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         )
																		 AND (CAST ( (INC.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') >= ( SELECT cast( START_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         AND CAST ( (INC.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS')<= ( SELECT cast( END_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         )
                                                                         AND INC.INCIDENT_TYPE in ('ANC','TAC','SMB','TAC-B2B')
                                                                         AND BL_INCIDENT_KEY = (
SELECT MAX(BL_INCIDENT_KEY)
                                                                         FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_F_V MAXINC
                                                                         WHERE MAXINC.INCIDENT_NUMBER = INC.INCIDENT_NUMBER
																		 AND (CAST ( (MAXINC.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') >= ( SELECT cast( START_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         AND CAST ( (MAXINC.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS')<= ( SELECT cast( END_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         )
                                                                         )
                                                                         AND INC.CURRENT_OWNER_WG_NAME = WKG.WG_NAME
                                                                        AND WKG.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT =   (select FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT from $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                                                                        ) VOL_FACT,(
SELECT EATWF.INCIDENT_NUMBER, EATWF.CHG_WKGRP_NAME, EATWF.ACTS_WORKTIME,
                            EATWF.ACTIVITY_DATE 
FROM   
$$ETLVWDB.EL_ACTS_TSLA_WORKTIME_F EATWF,$$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_TAC_WORKGROUP WKG
WHERE 1=1  
              AND      EATWF.CHG_WKGRP_NAME=WKG.WG_NAME
              AND     ( CAST ( (EATWF.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') >= ( SELECT cast( START_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         AND CAST ( (EATWF.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS')<= ( SELECT cast( END_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         )
              AND      WKG.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT =  (select FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT from $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)) ACTS
                                                                        WHERE  1=1
                                                                        AND VOL_FACT.INCIDENT_NUMBER = ACTS.INCIDENT_NUMBER
                     AND ( CAST ( (ACTS.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') >= ( SELECT cast( START_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         AND CAST ( (ACTS.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS')<= ( SELECT cast( END_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         )
                                                             GROUP BY  ACTS.INCIDENT_NUMBER, ACTS.CHG_WKGRP_NAME
UNION
ALL
SELECT               ACTS.INCIDENT_NUMBER,
                                                                                     ACTS.CHG_WKGRP_NAME AS WG_NAME,
                                                                                     CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(22,10)) AS ACOD,
                                                                                     SUM (CAST(ACTS.ACTS_WORKTIME AS DECIMAL(22,
                            10))) AS ACCRUED_ACOD
               FROM (
SELECT INC.INCIDENT_NUMBER,
                       INC.CLOSED_DATE,
                       INC.CURRENT_OWNER_WG_NAME,
                       WKG.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
                  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_F_V INC,
                       $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_TAC_WORKGROUP WKG
                 WHERE     1 = 1
                       AND INC.CLOSED_DATE IS NOT NULL
                                                                         AND ( CAST ((INC.CLOSED_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') >= ( SELECT cast( START_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         AND CAST ( (INC.CLOSED_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS')<= ( SELECT cast( END_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         )
																		 AND (CAST ( (INC.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') >= ( SELECT cast( START_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         AND CAST ( (INC.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS')<= ( SELECT cast( END_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
																		 )
                                                                         AND INC.INCIDENT_TYPE in ('ANC','TAC','SMB','TAC-B2B')
                                                                         AND BL_INCIDENT_KEY = (
SELECT MAX(BL_INCIDENT_KEY)
                                                                         FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_F_V MAXINC
                                                                         WHERE MAXINC.INCIDENT_NUMBER = INC.INCIDENT_NUMBER
																		 AND (CAST ( (MAXINC.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') >= ( SELECT cast( START_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         AND CAST ( (MAXINC.ACTIVITY_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP  format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS')<= ( SELECT cast( END_DATE as timestamp format 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SS') FROM $$STGDB.WI_FISCAL_MONTH_ACTS)
                                                                         )
                                                                         )
                                                                         AND INC.CURRENT_OWNER_WG_NAME = WKG.WG_NAME
                                                                        AND WKG.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = (select FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT from $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                                                                        ) VOL_FACT,(
SELECT EATWF.INCIDENT_NUMBER, EATWF.CHG_WKGRP_NAME, EATWF.ACTS_WORKTIME,
                            EATWF.ACTIVITY_DATE 
FROM   
$$ETLVWDB.EL_ACTS_TSLA_WORKTIME_F EATWF,$$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_TAC_WORKGROUP WKG, $$ETLVWDB.EL_FISCAL_MONTH_CCM FM
WHERE 1=1  
              AND      EATWF.CHG_WKGRP_NAME=WKG.WG_NAME
			  AND     EATWF.ACTIVITY_DATE between FM.start_date and FM.end_date
              AND      WKG.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT =  FM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT) ACTS
                                                                        WHERE  1=1
                                                                        AND VOL_FACT.INCIDENT_NUMBER = ACTS.INCIDENT_NUMBER
                                                         GROUP BY ACTS.INCIDENT_NUMBER, ACTS.CHG_WKGRP_NAME) ACOD
                                                         GROUP BY  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,ACOD.INCIDENT_NUMBER, ACOD.WG_NAME
